name: silver_to_gold_gold_enrollment_count

steps.sql_logic:
INSERT INTO gold_enrollment_count (course_id, total_enrollments)
SELECT 
    course_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_enrollments
FROM 
    enrollment_table
GROUP BY 
    course_id;
steps.description: Total number of enrollments in each course

description: Transform gold_enrollment_count from silver to gold
